tests.source_program:
define i1 @fabs_ole_zero(float %x) {
entry:
  %cmp = fcmp oge float %x, 0.000000e+00
  %neg = fneg float %x
  %abs = select i1 %cmp, float %x, float %neg
  %result = fcmp ole float %abs, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %result
}
